title: SMKV Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: SMKV Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: SMKV Result 2026 Out for BA, BSc (Life Science) and BCom semester exams on the official website - smkvbastar.in on 17-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the SMKV Result 2026.

content.text: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya (SMKV), Bastar has officially declared the SMKV Result 2026 for various undergraduate semester examinations conducted for BA, BSc (Life Science) and BCom courses. The latest update includes Bachelor of Commerce Third Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate, Bachelor of Science (Life Science) First Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate, Bachelor of Arts First Semester - Backlog, Bachelor of Science (Life Science) First Semester - Backlog, Bachelor of Science (Life Science) Third Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate, Bachelor of Arts Third Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate and Bachelor of Arts First Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate results. SMKV Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - smkvbastar.in.

Students can check and download their SMKV BA, BSc and BCom semester results by visiting the university’s result portal and selecting the appropriate course, semester, and Regular / Non Collegiate or Backlog category. They are typically required to enter their roll number or other basic exam details to view their individual marksheet on the result page. After accessing the result, students should confirm their name, roll number, course, semester, and subject-wise marks, and in case of any error or mismatch, they must immediately contact the university or their affiliated college for rectification.

Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya has issued a consolidated SMKV Results 2026 update for various BA, BSc (Life Science) and BCom semesters on 17 April 2026. The results cover both Regular / Non Collegiate categories as well as Backlog examinations, ensuring that current batch students and backlog candidates can access their marks together. All results have been made available digitally through the SMKV result portal, enabling students to check their semester-wise status online without visiting the university in person.

SMKV has activated the result portal link where all the latest semester results for BA, BSc (Life Science) and BCom can be accessed in one place. From there, candidates can choose their respective course and semester (1st or 3rd) along with Regular / Non Collegiate or Backlog status, and then proceed to view their marks. The table below organizes the available SMKV Result 2026 options and points all of them to the official result page, from where students can navigate to the appropriate result.

Bachelor of Science (Life Science) First Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate Result 2026
Bachelor of Arts First Semester - Backlog Result 2026

Bachelor of Arts Third Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate Result 2026
Bachelor of Arts First Semester - Regular / Non Collegiate Result 2026

sections.heading: Steps to Check SMKV Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your SMKV BA, BSc (Life Science) and BCom semester results online:

items: Open your browser and go to the official SMKV result portal: https://smkvbastar.in/result.php.
On the result page, select the appropriate exam type or course from the available options (for example BA, BSc Life Science, BCom).
Choose your semester (1st or 3rd) and category (Regular / Non Collegiate or Backlog) as applicable for your examination.
Enter your roll number or other required exam credentials in the specified field.
Click on the 'View Result' or similar button to submit your details and view your marksheet on the screen.
Verify your personal details and subject-wise marks, then download or print the result for future reference and contact the university/college if any discrepancy is noticed.
